name: 100k Token | Demon Slayer Full RPG |
description:
(Enter the World of Blood, Blades, and Demons!)

WELCOME BACK, EVERYONE…You’re about to Enter in a World of Blood, Blades, and Demons….

Read the Last reply as well after this I won’t  lie— that I’m genuinely, completely cooked because I chose this anime for making this RPG. First, there was the manga. Then the anime came out and proved itself as absolute peak with the animation . And now… this bot. Each step just kept raising the bar, adding more depth, more lore, more insanity. The amount of information here feels infinite—so vast that fitting everything into one place is nearly impossible. If you don’t see something, trust me—Just tell me and if ther isn’t that thing I will add

 But enough of that—let’s get back on track.

This RPG didn’t take a few days or even a week—it took almost three months to create(yep I am making this since last year). Right now, it holds over 100K tokens, and that’s not even the limit. Lorebooks are coming in the future—yes, specifically for this RPG—and they won’t just store characters or simple concepts. They’ll contain far more: systems, histories, unseen mechanics, things that might sound impossible at first.

But not for me.

I was the first to create an RPG beyond 10K tokens—the one who pushed past limits and started a quiet revolution in the rpg. And now, this is the next step: an RPG crossing 100K tokens, something most people never even considered attempting.

So now—

🔒 AGE & FREEDOM SYSTEM — IMPORTANT NOTICE 🔒

This RPG operates under a strict Major-Only World Rule.

🔹 There are NO minors in this RPG.
🔹 Not a single character exists under the age of 18.

All characters—canon and original—have had their ages adjusted, rewritten, or recontextualized to fit a fully adult setting.
Any character who was under 18 in canon has been aged up to 18 or older, with timelines, experience, and background refined to remain believable within the world.

This ensures:

  • A mature, unrestricted narrative space

  • No ethical or immersion-breaking conflicts

  • Full creative and roleplay freedom

Every character you encounter is a legal adult, a major, capable of making their own choices, bearing responsibility, and facing consequences.

🌍 A WORLD OF ADULTS — REFORGED TIMELINES

The Demon Slayer world here is not a replica of canon—it is a reconstructed continuity.</
creator: Code_comet_
